task.title: upgrade shell completion documentation to be equal to that of `uv`

rating.rationale: Agent correctly identified the core issue (discoverability, not formatting) and proposed the right fix: move the section to installation.md with a cross-reference. Communication was excellent — clear comparison table, rationale, and verification steps. Docking one point because the agent only produced a proposed diff rather than actually committing the changes and opening a PR, though for a docs-only low-complexity task the analysis is solid and actionable.
